user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] Scheduled Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected initiated for Coho Winery.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Eric Kim <eric.kim@cohowinery.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-20 15:49 EST
Subject: Re: Re: security posture Timeline

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about security posture. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Eric Kim <eric.kim@cohowinery.com>
Date: 2024-02-04 10:55 EST
Subject: URGENT: security posture Issue at Coho Winery

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with security posture. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Eric Kim <eric.kim@cohowinery.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-27 15:51 EST
Subject: URGENT: security posture Issue at Coho Winery

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about security posture. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

Meeting: security posture Discussion - Coho Winery
Date: 2024-02-14
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Eric Kim (Coho Winery), Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft)

[00:02:00] Eric Kim (Coho Winery): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on security posture from our last session.

[00:05:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is resource allocation.

[00:09:00] Eric Kim (Coho Winery): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is cost optimization.

[00:11:00] Eric Kim (Coho Winery): Our VP reviewed this and has concerns about vendor dependencies. Can we address those?

[00:14:00] Eric Kim (Coho Winery): Our director reviewed this and has concerns about vendor dependencies. Can we address those?

[00:17:00] Eric Kim (Coho Winery): On the security posture front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around data residency.

[00:20:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on security compliance and found that the cost projections need to factor in reserved instance pricing for accuracy.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Coho Winery: the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around
